questions.question: A space lab is launching a rocket with $x^2 + 3x + 2x + 6$ kilograms of fuel.

options.A: The factored form of the expression is $(x+2)(x+3)$
options.B: The factored form of the expression is $(x+1)(x+6)$
options.C: The factored form of the expression is $(x+3)(x+2)$
options.D: The factored form of the expression is $(x+6)(x+1)$
options.E: The factored form of the expression is $(x+2)(x+1)$

questions.question: A physicist is analyzing data with the expression: $4x^2 + 12x + 3x + 9$

options.A: The factored form of the expression is $4(x+3)(x+3/4)$
options.B: The factored form of the expression is $(4x+3)(x+3)$
options.C: The factored form of the expression is $(4x+9)(x+1)$
options.D: The factored form of the expression is $(2x+3)(2x+3)$
options.E: The factored form of the expression is $(4x+3)(x+1)$

questions.question: The mass of a planet is given by $x^2 + 2x + 5x + 10$ kilograms.

options.A: The factored form of the expression is $(x+2)(x+5)$
options.B: The factored form of the expression is $(x+5)(x+2)$
options.C: The factored form of the expression is $(x+1)(x+10)$
options.D: The factored form of the expression is $(x+10)(x+1)$
options.E: The factored form of the expression is $(x+2)(x+1)$

questions.question: The number of moons orbiting a planet is given by $3x^2 + 6x + 2x + 4$

options.A: The factored form of the expression is $3(x+2)(x+1)$
options.B: The factored form of the expression is $3(x+1)(x+2)$
options.C: The factored form of the expression is $3(x+1)(x+4)$
options.D: The factored form of the expression is $(3x+2)(x+2)$
options.E: The factored form of the expression is $(3x+4)(x+1)$

questions.question: The speed of a spaceship is given by $2x^2 + 4x + 5x + 10$ meters per second.

options.A: The factored form of the expression is $(2x+5)(x+2)$
options.B: The factored form of the expression is $2(x+2)(x+5/2)$
options.C: The factored form of the expression is $(2x+2)(x+5)$
options.D: The factored form of the expression is $(x+2)(2x+10)$
options.E: The factored form of the expression is $2(x+5/2)(x+2)$

questions.question: Factor the expression: $x^2 + 4x + 3x + 12$ and verify by multiplication
Factor the expression: $2x^2 + 5x + 2x + 10$ and verify by multiplication

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Ensure students understand the importance of factoring by grouping in science applications
Tip 2: Use visual aids to demonstrate factoring by grouping
Tip 3: Encourage students to check their work by multiplying the factored expression
